name: Mcintosh County Bank
description_short: McIntosh County Bank is a community bank in Ashley, North Dakota offering online and mobile banking services, including checking, savings, transfers, and digital payment tools.
description_long:
McIntosh County Bank is a regional financial institution based in Ashley, North Dakota, serving the McIntosh County area. Founded as a traditional community bank, MCB has modernized its service delivery through digital banking platforms while maintaining local branch presence.

The bank offers core banking services including online banking, mobile banking with check deposit capabilities, checking and savings accounts, bill pay, and debit card management. They provide external account transfer functionality (TransferNow) allowing customers to move money from accounts at other banks, mobile wallet integration with Apple Pay and Google Pay, and access to 37,000 ATMs nationwide through MoneyPass partnership. Their Card Manager feature allows real-time card monitoring, spending visualization, transaction alerts, and immediate card lock/unlock capabilities from the mobile app.

MCB distinguishes itself through robust mobile banking technology for a community bank, including mobile deposit, real-time transaction alerts, card spending maps showing merchant locations, and comprehensive card control features accessible 24/7. They actively engage the community through event announcements and are actively hiring, suggesting growth. The bank emphasizes accessibility with screen-reader compatibility on their website.

As a small community bank, MCB likely has limited product depth compared to national banks—the website does not mention personal loans, credit cards, mortgages, investment services, or business banking products. There is no information about account fees, minimum balances, interest rates, or deposit insurance details. The bank's service area appears limited to the Ashley, North Dakota region, making physical branch access unavailable for most consumers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with account access, transfers, and bill pay
Mobile banking app with real-time account access and notifications
Mobile deposit (check deposits via smartphone camera)
TransferNow external account transfers from other banks
Card Manager with real-time alerts, spending maps, and card lock/unlock
Mobile wallet integration (Apple Pay, Google Pay)
MoneyPass ATM network access (37,000 ATMs nationwide, no fees)
Debit card with merchant contact integration
Fraud protection and scam education resources
pros: Access to 37,000 MoneyPass ATMs nationwide with no ATM fees when using MCB debit card
Mobile deposit feature allows check deposits anytime, anywhere via smartphone without branch visit
TransferNow service enables easy transfers from accounts at other banks directly through online or mobile banking
Card Manager provides real-time transaction alerts, spending visualization on maps, and 24/7 self-service card lock/unlock from mobile app
Mobile wallet integration (Apple Pay, Google Pay) for quick, secure contactless payments
24/7 digital banking access even when physical branch is closed, including lost card reporting and transaction disputes
Merchant contact integration within mobile app to quickly resolve transaction issues directly with businesses
cons: Limited geographic service area (Ashley, North Dakota branch only) making in-person banking inaccessible for most consumers
Website does not disclose account fees, minimum balance requirements, or interest rates for checking/savings products
No information about additional financial products such as personal loans, credit cards, mortgages, or business banking services
As a small community bank, likely limited customer service capacity and specialized financial advisory compared to national institutions
No mention of FDIC insurance details, fraud protection specifics, or deposit limits on website
best_for: Residents of Ashley, North Dakota and McIntosh County seeking local community banking with modern digital tools
Customers who frequently need remote check deposits and want mobile-first banking convenience
People who want to avoid ATM fees and value access to 37,000 nationwide MoneyPass ATMs
Consumers seeking real-time card controls and spending monitoring through mobile banking
diagnosis: McIntosh County Bank is best for residents of Ashley, North Dakota and the surrounding McIntosh County area who want a community bank with modern, convenient digital banking features including mobile deposit, real-time card controls, and nationwide ATM access without fees. The primary caveat is that this is a small regional bank with limited geographic reach and no visible online account opening or expanded product offerings, making it inaccessible for customers outside the immediate service area or those seeking comprehensive financial services beyond basic banking.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: McIntosh County Bank in Ashley, North Dakota offers online and mobile banking including checking, savings, transfers, and digital payments.
